operations.value: Under short-term partial sleep restriction, 3 g of glycine before bedtime improved some next-day fatigue and performance measures versus placebo, but the study was small and does not show that glycine reverses the broader effects of chronic sleep loss.
operations.notes: Keeps the sleep-restriction context and avoids presenting glycine as a substitute for sufficient sleep.

sources.title: The Effects of Glycine on Subjective Daytime Performance in Partially Sleep-Restricted Healthy Volunteers

notes: Adds qualified next-day fatigue and performance findings.
